item.title: Stories from the River Thames
item.description: A journey with a licensed mudlark exploring the Thames foreshore and the stories behind historic finds. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the

media:content.media:title: Stories from the River Thames
media:content.media:description: A journey with a licensed mudlark exploring the Thames foreshore and the stories behind historic finds. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the

item.title: Unique Coke Bottle Found on the Thames
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares the story behind a distinctive Coke bottle find. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Unique Coke Bottle Found on the Thames
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares the story behind a distinctive Coke bottle find. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Ancient and Modern Treasures on the Thames
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore, where ancient and modern finds reveal everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Ancient and Modern Treasures on the Thames
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore, where ancient and modern finds reveal everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Identifying Antique Bottle Stoppers
item.description: Nicola White explores antique bottle stoppers and traces their origins through Thames foreshore finds. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Identifying Antique Bottle Stoppers
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores antique bottle stoppers and traces their origins through Thames foreshore finds. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Collecting Tiny Finds on the Thames
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore, collecting tiny mudlarking finds and uncovering the stories they may hold. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares ship remains found at low tide, revealing traces of the river’s liquid history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is

item.title: Saving a Special Object at Low Tide
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore to save a special object before the tide returns. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore to save a special object before the tide returns. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: A Long Pipe Stem on the Thames Foreshore
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and uncovers a long pipe stem, a small find that offers a glimpse into everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames
